title: Pomodoro Timer
seoDescription: Free online Pomodoro timer. Boost productivity with 25-minute focus sessions and 5-minute breaks. Customizable work/break intervals. Perfect for studying, work, and deep focus.
howToUseTitle: How to Use the Pomodoro Timer
step1Desc: Click Start to begin a 25-minute focus session. Work without distractions until the timer rings.
step2Desc: After each session, take a 5-minute short break. After 4 sessions, enjoy a 15-minute long break.
step3Desc: Continue the cycle. The Pomodoro technique helps maintain focus and prevent burnout.
faq1A: A time management method using 25-minute focus intervals separated by short breaks, developed by Francesco Cirillo.
faq2A: 25 minutes is long enough to make progress but short enough to maintain intense focus.
faq3A: Currently using standard intervals. Custom timing coming soon!
